---
title: "Sample Validation Corpus"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

Draw a stratified sample of 100 posts from the humanized corpus (10 per
Perspective score bin) and write the result to the ratings oTree app as a
fixed, version-controlled CSV. Running this script once pins the exact 100
posts used in the human validation study.

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(data.table)

SEED          <- 230691
N_BINS        <- 10L
POSTS_PER_BIN <- 10L

INPUT_PATH  <- "../software/DICE/static/data/toxic_movie_reactions.csv"
OUTPUT_PATH <- "software/ratings/corpus.csv"
```

```{r}
#| label: load

set.seed(SEED)
dt <- fread(INPUT_PATH)
dt <- dt[sponsored == 0]
cat("Full corpus:", nrow(dt), "posts\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: bin

# Bin by Perspective toxicity score: [0,0.1), [0.1,0.2), ..., [0.9,1.0]
breaks <- seq(0, 1, by = 1 / N_BINS)
dt[, bin := as.integer(cut(toxicity,
                           breaks        = breaks,
                           labels        = seq_len(N_BINS) - 1L,
                           include.lowest = TRUE,
                           right          = FALSE))]

dt[, .N, keyby = bin]
```

```{r}
#| label: sample

sampled <- dt[, .SD[sample(.N, min(POSTS_PER_BIN, .N))], by = bin]
setorder(sampled, bin, doc_id)

cat("Sampled:", nrow(sampled), "posts across", uniqueN(sampled$bin), "bins\n")
sampled[, .N, keyby = bin]
```

```{r}
#| label: export

out <- sampled[, .(doc_id, text, toxicity, gpt_toxicity, bin)]
fwrite(out, OUTPUT_PATH)
cat("Written to", OUTPUT_PATH, "\n")
```
